We Ranked Second Among All Universities in the Ratio of Students Benefiting from Education Scholarships

23.11.2022

The “2022 University Monitoring and Evaluation General Report” prepared by the Council of Higher Education has been published.

According to the report, our University

Ranked 2nd among foundation universities with the highest rate of students benefiting from educational scholarships with 79%,

Ranked 2nd among the universities with the highest rate of courses taken from different programs with 60%,

Ranked 4th among foundation universities with the highest current expenditure per student.

Details of the report can be accessed at

https://www.yok.gov.tr/Sayfalar/Haberler/2022/2022-universite-izleme-ve-degerlenen-genel-raporu-yayimlandi.aspx

.
